Turning data and AI into systems that ship.

Microsoft Certified Trainer (MCT)MCP & AgentsData PlatformsRAG & Evaluation

About

I'm Rajat — a Data & AI Architect at Microsoft. I design and build production agentic systems: Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, and the data platforms underneath them.

I care about the unglamorous parts that make AI actually work in production — clean data contracts, grounded outputs, evaluation, and disciplined lifecycle management. I teach with analogies and real examples, because the best systems are simple, not clever.

Writing — The Data Muse

Essays on GenAI, LLMs, AI agents, data engineering, and analytics platforms — teaching the hard parts in plain language.

The Data Muse

Essays on GenAI, LLMs, AI agents, data engineering, and analytics platforms — teaching the hard parts in plain language.

Read all essays on Substack →

What I write & build about

AI agents & MCP

Designing multi-agent systems and Model Context Protocol tools that are reliable in production.

GenAI & RAG

Retrieval, grounding, and evaluation patterns that keep LLM outputs trustworthy.

Data platforms

Modular, open-format data architectures — decoupled storage/compute, governance, contracts.

From POC to production

The lifecycle discipline that turns a demo into a system teams depend on.

Get in touch

Always up for a good conversation on data, AI, and building things that last.
